description: Due to a shortage of a specific component (e.g., panoramic sunroofs), several vehicles in the production queue must be resequenced to prioritize building cars that don't require the part.

nodes.task_description: Identify all vehicles in the next 24-hour production queue that require the sunroof.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a list of 50 VINs that are scheduled for sunroof installation.

nodes.task_description: Update the production schedule to move the identified vehicles to a later build slot.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully re-orders the production queue.

nodes.task_description: Ensure the parts delivery system is updated to match the new build sequence.

expected_outcome.value: Agent syncs the production schedule with the parts logistics system to prevent mis-delivery of components.
